heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
label: 1021 to 1024 Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
notes: Section 1021, , pt. III, § 301, , established National Guard and Army Reserve as reserve components of the Army. See , Armed Forces.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 498section 3062 of Title 10
Section 1022, , pt. III, § 302, , redesignated Organized Reserve Corps as Army Reserve.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 498
Section 1023, , pt. III, § 303, , related to composition of Army Reserve. See .act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 498section 10104 of Title 10
Section 1024, , pt. III, § 304, , related to women in Army Reserve.act July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 498
